titleStmt.title: SII 24.277: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 277. (A.R. No. 74 of 1892.) ROOM IN THE SOUTH-WEST CORNER OF THE THIRD PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 100,000 kāśu with the approval of god Raṅganātha towards various daily offerings to Nāyaṉār Thirukkuḻalūdiyaruḷugiṟa Piḷḷai and his consorts, by Aḻagiya Maṇavāḷabhaṭṭar alias Kachchiyarāya Brahmādhirājar of Vaṅgippuṟam in Raṇadhīra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirumuṉaippāḍi Aviyaṉūr-nāḍu. The details of the date viz. 15th year, Mithuna, ba. 11 Sunday, Bharaṇi, correspond regularly to A.D. 1270, June 15, Sunday, ·73; ·42.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . sārvabhauma śrīmat pratāpaccakravarttikaḷ
pocaḷa śrīvīrarāmanāthadevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉai
ñcāvatu mithunanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekāda
śiyum nāyiṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa bharaṇināḷ
Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭi Aviyaṉūrnā
ṭṭu brahmadeyam raṇadhīraccaturvedimaṅkalattu
vaṅkippuṟattu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa bhaṭṭarāṉa ka
cciyarāya brahmādhirājar Ivviṭattu Ukantaruḷap
paṇṇi tiruvārādhanaṅ koṇṭaruḷukiṟa Innā
yaṉār tirukkuḻalūtiyaruḷukiṟa piḷḷaikkum nāc
cimārkkum tiruvārādhanattukkum Amutupaṭi cāt
tuppaṭikaḷukkum Ubhayamāka nūṟāyiraṅ
kācu śrīpaṇṭārattile Oṭukka Itil vṛddhi
kku Innāḷ mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅ
katevaṉāle patakku tirupponakap paḻavariciyum
Ivvarici viḻukkāṭu paruppamutu Uppamutu mi
ḷakamutu kaṟiyamutu neyyamutu Aṭaikkāyamutu
Ilaiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa Amutupaṭikaḷum Eṇṇai
kkāppu nellikkāppu mañcaḷkāppu cantaṉakkāppu tiru
ppaḷḷittāmam tirumālai tirupparivaṭṭa muḷḷiṭṭa cā
ttuppaṭikaḷum nāḷtoṟum tirukkoṭṭakārattile vi
ṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivar jiyarkku vi
ṇṇappañceytu varakkāṭṭukayāle Ippaṭiye jiyarum tiru
ppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyyum janaṅkaḷum peru
māḷukku viṇṇappañceyya tiruvuḷḷamāy Ippaṭikku ceyvatā
kavum paṇṇik kuṭuttu Ippaṭikku Uṅkaḷ Ōlaiyuṅ kuṭuṅkoḷeṉ
ṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku mahāniyogamum puṟappaṭ
ṭu śrīpaṇṭārattile kācu nūṟāyiramum Oṭukki taravum puṟappa
ṭukaiyil Innāḷ mutal Ippaṭi nittal vanta Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi
kaḷ candrādityavat naṭakka kaṭavatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttatu
Itu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
